response.original_title: Walls of the World. N. Ireland
response.overview: Narrated by the 2018 Emmy® Award-winning actor Matthew Rhys, this compelling series explores six of the world's most iconic walls and borders. From the crumbling ruins of ancient walls to brick barriers that are currently under construction, each program uncovers the human stories behind these walls and asks why they were built, how they affect people's lives, and what happens when the walls come down.
response.title: Walls of the World. N. Ireland
